holdings.infoBox: TCV is an equity ETF with a total of 44 individual holdings. The top holdings are Liberty Energy stock at 4.35%, ProPetro Holding at 4.12%, PBF Energy at 4.10%, Gold.com at 3.87%, and Par Pacific Holdings at 3.55%.

overview.description: The Towle Value ETF (TCV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund seeks long-term capital appreciation by actively managing a narrow portfolio of US value stocks. Security selection is based on the belief that investor biases create persistent market inefficiencies. TCV was launched on Jul 16, 2025 and is issued by Towle.
